name: Catherine
text: I cannot recommend a stay here highly enough. I still can't believe how beautiful everything was here. The rooms are stunning and the gardens too. The food was impeccable and the service from Amos was top class.

name: Gary Smith
text: Flavia is a wonderful host, Amos ensures wonderful service and the chef is a magician — this was the best food I'd had in a month. The location is beautiful and the accommodation classic style with lovely decoration throughout. I'd stay here again in a heartbeat.

name: Jessica Schackermann
text: A true hidden gem. Very nice garden restaurant with great food and an amazing little forest with nice walking trails. We saw monkeys and many birds, including an owl.

name: Becky Stout
text: Absolutely gorgeous and well worth the visit. The room was amazing — clean, spacious, good shower, comfy bed! The food was to die for — the best main course I've had in Malawi. I had the ravioli with mushrooms.

name: Elie Olivier
text: Amazing half-day in Thyolo House! The staff, especially Amos, is so welcoming and the food so delicious! No doubt the best pasta in Malawi. You can also walk in the forest and see the tea plantations around.

name: Niamh Russell
text: Absolutely beautiful oasis! Very comfortable and beautiful grounds to walk around. The staff were so lovely and helpful. Yummy Italian food and amazing breakfast!

name: Gerrit Roorda
text: Just perfect. Gorgeous scenery, beautiful house and swimming pool, very friendly staff, real Italian food. Couldn't be better.

name: harrycI7199CD
text: This is just a gem of a spot. The ice cream and orange cake is lush, service is just exceptional, and the environment is both child friendly and a great date spot.

name: belle1012
text: We went here for lunch, upon the recommendation of a friend. Definitely one of the best pasta dishes I have ever had. The staff are so warm and friendly.

name: Kate E.
text: My friends and I booked a weekend away at this little gem about 30 mins from Blantyre. We had an outdoor tea party that the staff hosted for us and nothing was too hard. The rooms were so well presented.
